summary: Context Efficiency Pipeline spec approved — rigor controls, scratchpad, Jaccard-scored learnings, two-pass planning, commands-over-skills audit, checkpoint commits across 5 implementation phases.

decisions.why: All address token waste from different angles
Last clean window to rename unused vocabulary
Reasoning already has structured homes in session state

decisions.what: Jaccard keyword scoring for learnings relevance
decisions.why: Numeric scores enable threshold filtering; tags too coarse; graph requires new node type
Skeleton catches directional errors before 2000+ tokens of detail
Narrow audit is actionable; guideline covers broader pattern

decisions.what: Checkpoint commits + recovery commit on failure
decisions.why: Checkpoints are stable boundaries; recovery prevents work loss
Shared modules tested before integration; fan-out parallelizable
